subject: See it in Action: the SchoolAI Browser Extension
previewText: There's a better way to work. We'll show you how.
module-4-0-0:
You're already in Google Docs. You're already browsing for lesson ideas. What if SchoolAI was right there with you?

 

Join us for a live demo of the SchoolAI Browser Extension and see what it looks like when AI meets you where you already work.

 

Here's what we'll show you:

  • Open a student essay and get rubric-aligned feedback in seconds
  • Turn any article or webpage into a lesson plan, worksheet, or interactive Space with one click
  • Translate content or adjust reading levels instantly
  • Launch a personalized learning experience for students, right from your browser

 

No tab switching. No new logins. More moments that matter, right from your browser.

 

📅 Thursday, March 12 | 5:00 PM MT | Free to attend
